title: Cross-validated LDA fit over pre-split train/test folds
summary: Walks a folds directory (fold1, fold2, …), fits LDA on each fold's train.csv, scores its test.csv, and writes a cross-fold summary plus per-fold artefacts.
description: For each subdirectory named `fold*` in `folds_dir` containing `train.csv` and `test.csv`, fits a Fisher linear discriminant, predicts on both train and test, and writes per-fold artefacts (spec/fit/coefficients/report) under `{run_dir}/ocinfo/{run_name}_dfa/{fold_id}/`. Aggregates per-fold metrics (log-likelihood, mean log-likelihood, hit rate) into `cv_summary.csv` and `cv_summary.json` at the run's store directory, with FOLD rows and MEAN / SD / POOLED summary rows. Emits a single started / finished event pair.
usage:
[["model-dfa::cv-fit-finalize"]]
folds_dir = "<dir>"
run_dir = "<dir>"
run_name = "dfa_cv_run"
y_col = "y"
# optional:
x_cols = "x1,x3,x5-x8"

arguments.name: folds_dir
arguments.description: Directory containing fold subdirs. Each subdir must be named `fold*` and contain `train.csv` and `test.csv` with matching column layouts.

arguments.name: run_name
arguments.description: Short identifier for this run. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

arguments.name: y_col
arguments.description: Name or 1-based index of the class-label column. Labels must be exactly 1..=K.

arguments.name: x_cols
arguments.description: Comma-separated specifier picking feature columns (names, 1-based indices, or ranges like `3-7`). Default: all columns except y_col.

arguments.name: headers
arguments.description: Whether the fold CSVs have a header row. Default `true`.

arguments.name: random_seed
arguments.description: Recorded in each spec.json. Does not affect the deterministic LDA fit.

arguments.name: threads
arguments.description: Number of Rayon worker threads used to fit folds in parallel. Each fold is an independent LDA fit, so wall-clock time scales roughly linearly with thread count. `1` (default) runs folds serially. Results are deterministic regardless of thread count.

details: Folds are discovered by scanning `folds_dir` for subdirectories whose names start with `fold` (sorted lexicographically). Each fold is fit independently; a single failing fold does not abort the run — its row in `cv_summary.csv` records an error status and subsequent folds still fit. The POOLED row collapses folds by summing counts and log-likelihoods: pooled mean-llh = Σ total_llh / Σ n, pooled hit-rate is n-weighted.
value:
On success, `{run_dir}/ocinfo/{run_name}_dfa/` contains:

- `{fold_id}/` (one per fold) — full fit-finalize artefacts (`spec.json`, `fit.json`, `*_coefficients.csv`, `*_report.xlsx`).
- `cv_summary.csv` — one FOLD row per fold + MEAN / SD / POOLED summary rows.
- `cv_summary.json` — the same content in JSON.
- `{run_name}_dfa_cv_report.xlsx` — single-sheet workbook of the same summary.

The primary CSV is copied to `{run_dir}/{run_name}_dfa_cv_summary.csv` for discoverability.
notes: Fold directories must be named `fold*` and contain both `train.csv` and `test.csv`.
All folds must share the same column layout (same `y_col` and feature columns).
A failed fold writes an error row but does not abort the run — check the `status` column of `cv_summary.csv`.

see_also.description: Single-shot LDA fit on one CSV.

fields.name: folds_dir
fields.description: Directory containing fold* subdirs with train.csv + test.csv.

fields.name: y_col
fields.description: Name or 1-based index of the class-label column.

fields.name: headers
fields.description: Whether the fold CSVs have a header row.

fields.name: threads
fields.description: Rayon worker threads for parallel per-fold fits. Default: 1.
